description: Create a GitHub Actions C/C++ CI workflow for Windows that triggers on push events. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build in both Debug and Release modes. It checks out the code, installs the Windows SDK and Visual Studio build tools, clones depot_tools, fetches webrtc, builds the project using CMake and Ninja, creates a package with cpack, uploads the artifact, and creates a GitHub release if the push is a tag. The workflow runs on windows-latest and uses various environment variables to configure the build process.
